name: yt-dlp
description: Download video and audio from YouTube, Twitch, TikTok, Vimeo, SoundCloud, and 1800+ other sites using yt-dlp
author: TheArchiver

settings.label: Default Library Folder
settings.description: Default folder within your downloads directory for downloaded content. Used when no per-site override matches (default: yt-dlp)

settings.label: Per-Site Download Folders
settings.description: Assign sites to specific download folders. Downloads from matched sites go into that subfolder instead of the default library folder.

settings.label: Video Quality
settings.description: Preferred video quality (yt-dlp will pick the best available up to this)

settings.label: Audio Only
settings.description: Download audio only (best quality audio, saved as .m4a/.opus)

settings.label: Embed Metadata
settings.description: Embed title, description, thumbnail, and chapter markers into the file

settings.label: Embed Subtitles
settings.description: Download and embed available subtitles into the video file

settings.label: Cookies File
settings.description: Upload a Netscape-format cookies.txt file for authenticated downloads (age-restricted, members-only, or private content). To export cookies from your browser: Chrome — use the "Get cookies.txt LOCALLY" extension. Firefox — use the "cookies.txt" extension. Visit the site you need cookies for, click the extension, and export.

settings.label: SponsorBlock
settings.description: Mark or remove sponsored segments using SponsorBlock data (YouTube only)

settings.label: Extra yt-dlp Arguments
settings.description: Additional command-line arguments passed to yt-dlp (advanced)
